intentSynonyms: create a price alert in coinbase
add a price alert in coinbase
make a new price alert in coinbase
open a new price alert in coinbase
create a price alert for an asset in coinbase
description: Create a price alert for a cryptocurrency asset. You will be notified when the asset price crosses the target price in the specified direction. Use get_asset_by_symbol to find the asset UUID.

asset_uuid.description: Asset UUID to set the alert for

target_price.description: Target price as a decimal string (e.g. "75000.00")

direction.description: Alert direction — ABOVE to notify when price rises above target, BELOW when it drops below
